Non-Compete.description: Restricts working in competing business after contract ends.

Mandatory Arbitration.description: Requires disputes through private arbitration, waives jury trial.

IP Assignment.description: Assigns ownership of intellectual property to the other party.

Auto-Renewal.description: Contract renews automatically unless cancelled in time.

Liquidated Damages.description: Pre-agreed financial penalty payable upon breach.

Indemnification.description: Requires covering losses and legal costs of the other party.

At-Will Employment.description: Either party can terminate employment at any time.

Salary Clawback.description: Requires repaying salary or bonuses under certain conditions.
